steps.title: Identify the yearly multiplier
steps.content:
The exponent $$\frac{x}{12}$$ converts months to years. After $12$ months, the exponent is
$$\frac{12}{12}=1$$
so the yearly multiplier is $0.64$.

steps.title: Convert retained value to loss
steps.content: A multiplier of $0.64$ means the equipment keeps $64\%$ of its value each year. The percent decrease is $$100\%-64\%=36\%$$ The answer is C.
